# `freebox_system_info` (Data Source)

Get system information about the Freebox (firmware version, hardware, temperatures, uptime).

## Example

```terraform
data "freebox_system_info" "example" {}

output "firmware_version" {
  value = data.freebox_system_info.example.firmware_version
}

output "temperatures" {
  value = {
    cpu_m  = data.freebox_system_info.example.temp_cpum
    cpu_b  = data.freebox_system_info.example.temp_cpub
    switch = data.freebox_system_info.example.temp_sw
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `board_name` (String) Hardware revision identifier
- `box_authenticated` (Boolean) Whether the Freebox is currently authenticated
- `fan_rpm` (Number) Fan speed in RPM
- `firmware_version` (String) Freebox firmware version
- `mac` (String) Freebox MAC address
- `serial` (String) Freebox serial number
- `temp_cpub` (Number) CPU B temperature in °C
- `temp_cpum` (Number) CPU M temperature in °C
- `temp_sw` (Number) Switch temperature in °C
- `uptime` (String) Human-readable uptime string
- `uptime_val` (Number) Uptime in seconds
- `user_main_storage` (String) Label of the storage partition used for user data
